content: build me an app that takes images of any type and converts them to any desired type

Now let me create all the source files. I'll write them in parallel batches.Now the renderer files:Now let me create the app icons and initialize git.Done! I built an image converter app where you can drag and drop (or browse for) images in any common format — JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, TIFF, GIF, SVG, and BMP — and convert them to your choice of JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, TIFF, or GIF. You can adjust the quality, choose where to save the converted files, and it keeps a history of all your conversions. Take a look!
Build an installer for this app and publish it to GitHub Releases. Give me the download link.

Building your installer and setting up the release now...Your app is ready! Here's the download link:

**https://github.com/adventure-gpt/image-converter/releases/tag/v1.0.0**

Anyone can grab the Windows installer from that page — just click the `.exe` file to download and install it.
are you missing a deploy step?

Build an installer for this app, publish it to GitHub Releases, and build a professional download/landing page for it on Cloudflare Pages with hero section, features, screenshots, and download buttons that auto-detect the user platform. Give me the download page URL and the GitHub release URL.

Building that now...Good - installer and release already exist. Now let me build a professional landing page and deploy it.The landing page already exists and looks great. Let me deploy it to Cloudflare Pages now.Your app is ready to distribute! Here are your links:

**Download page:** https://image-converter-app.pages.dev

**GitHub release:** https://github.com/adventure-gpt/image-converter/releases/tag/v1.0.0

The landing page has a hero section, features, a "how it works" walkthrough, stats, and download buttons that automatically detect whether someone is on Windows, Mac, or Linux. Right now the Windows installer is available — Mac and Linux buttons link to the releases page.
just release an update with a new version number please

Building that now...Your update is live! Here's the new release:

**https://github.com/adventure-gpt/image-converter/releases/tag/v1.1.0**

Distribute this app. You must do ALL of these: 1) Make sure the app has auto-update capability via electron-updater. 2) Bump the version number in package.json (increment the patch version from whatever it currently is). 3) Build the Windows installer with electron-builder. 4) Create a GitHub repo (if it does not exist), push the code, tag with the new version, and create a GitHub Release with the installer attached. 5) Create .github/workflows/build.yml that auto-builds for Windows, macOS, and Linux when a tag is pushed, then push it. 6) Build a professional download/landing page and deploy it to Cloudflare Pages. Give me the download page URL and GitHub release URL when done.

Building that now...Now creating the CI/CD workflow and updating the landing page in parallel.Now update the landing page with the new version and correct GitHub links.The token needs extra permissions. Let me refresh it — a browser window will pop up for you to approve.

Distribute this app. You must do ALL of these: 1) Make sure the app has auto-update capability via electron-updater. 2) Bump the version number in package.json (increment the patch version from whatever it currently is). 3) Build the Windows installer with electron-builder. 4) Create a GitHub repo (if it does not exist), push the code, tag with the new version, and create a GitHub Release with the installer attached. 5) Create .github/workflows/build.yml that auto-builds for Windows, macOS, and Linux when a tag is pushed, then push it. 6) Build a professional download/landing page and deploy it to Cloudflare Pages. Give me the download page URL and GitHub release URL when done.

Building that now...Now let me build the installer and update the download filename reference in the landing page.Installer built. Now let me commit, push, tag, create the release, and deploy the landing page.Your app is ready to distribute! Here are your links:

**Download page:** https://image-converter-app.pages.dev

**GitHub release:** https://github.com/adventure-gpt/image-converter/releases/tag/v1.3.0

Everything is set up — the Windows installer is on the release, the CI/CD workflow will automatically build for Windows, macOS, and Linux when tags are pushed, and the landing page is live with the new version.

Distribute this app. You must do ALL of these: 1) Make sure the app has auto-update capability via electron-updater. 2) Bump the version number in package.json (increment the patch version from whatever it currently is). 3) Build the Windows installer with electron-builder. 4) Create a GitHub repo (if it does not exist), push the code, tag with the new version, and create a GitHub Release with the installer attached. 5) Create .github/workflows/build.yml that auto-builds for Windows, macOS, and Linux when a tag is pushed, then push it. 6) Build a professional download/landing page and deploy it to Cloudflare Pages. Give me the download page URL and GitHub release URL when done.
